topStories.summary: Reliance Industries Chairman Mukesh Ambani steered clear of any timeline for the much-anticipated Reliance Retail IPO at the recent annual general meeting. Instead, he emphasized the retail giant's impressive scale, profitability, and ambitious growth plans. While investors hoped for listing updates, Ambani highlighted the business's strong operating performance and its expanding role in India's consumption landscape, leaving IPO expectations to linger.

india.title: Biden aide funded Wuhan lab to 'manipulate' Covid-19 assessments? Tulsi Gabbard's 'explosive' claim
india.summary: Former intelligence director Tulsi Gabbard released documents alleging Dr. Anthony Fauci funded gain-of-function research in Wuhan and misled Congress. The documents reportedly show Fauci's role in directing US taxpayer funds and interacting with intelligence officials to suppress lab-leak origins. These claims emerged during a declassification review, with whistleblowers alleging retaliation.

india.title: UAE launches first retail T-Sukuk, letting residents invest in government-backed assets from Dh1,000
india.summary: UAE residents can now invest in government-backed Islamic Treasury Sukuk with a minimum of Dh1,000, thanks to the launch of the Sovereign Retail T-Sukuk programme. This Shariah-compliant product, developed with the Central Bank, aims to boost savings and financial inclusion by offering individuals direct access to sovereign investment opportunities previously reserved for institutions.

india.title: 'Last ride': Air Force One Boeing 747 retires after Trump’s France trip, ending 35-year presidential service era
india.summary: The iconic Boeing 747-200B, a 35-year veteran of presidential service, completed its final flight as Air Force One, carrying President Trump back from France. This long-serving aircraft, affectionately nicknamed 'SAM 2900', is being retired. A newly refitted Boeing 747, gifted by Qatar, is set to take over presidential duties, with a potential inaugural flight to Mount Rushmore next month.
